hooks.command: bash -lc 'export AHK_RUNTIME=codex; AHK_SCRIPT=".harness/scripts/session-start.sh"; AHK_ROOT="${CODEX_PROJECT_DIR:-}"; if [ -z "$AHK_ROOT" ]; then AHK_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); fi; while [ ! -f "$AHK_ROOT/$AHK_SCRIPT" ] && [ "$AHK_ROOT" != "/" ]; do AHK_ROOT=$(dirname "$AHK_ROOT"); done; cd "$AHK_ROOT" || exit 1; exec bash "$AHK_SCRIPT"'

bash -lc 'export AHK_RUNTIME=codex; AHK_SCRIPT=".harness/scripts/userprompt-guard.sh"; AHK_ROOT="${CODEX_PROJECT_DIR:-}"; if [ -z "$AHK_ROOT" ]; then AHK_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); fi; while [ ! -f "$AHK_ROOT/$AHK_SCRIPT" ] && [ "$AHK_ROOT" != "/" ]; do AHK_ROOT=$(dirname "$AHK_ROOT"); done; cd "$AHK_ROOT" || exit 1; exec bash "$AHK_SCRIPT"'
